problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electromagnetic. Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
